![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/2500x1600ppfslip-1920x1152.webp)

# Q 

2 

M 

PPF SLIP

## Exterior / Preparation

### Dedicated installation lubricant for PPF.

Q²M PPF Slip is a specialized lubricant developed to support precise installation of paint protection film and vinyl wraps. It provides controlled slip during positioning, allowing installers to move, align and adjust the film accurately without premature bonding.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_ppf-slip_1000_2023-1-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Concentrated installation fluid for all types of PPF

Q²M PPF Slip improves installation efficiency by balancing glide and control. It helps reduce tension during film placement, minimises the risk of stretch marks and allows smooth positioning before final fixation. The formula is designed to work consistently during professional PPF applications.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons53.svg)

PURE SLIP SOLUTION 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons25.svg)

HIGHLY CONCENTRATED 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons56.svg)

QUICK EVAPORATION TIME 

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mppfslip.webp)

CAPACITIES 

1000 ML / 4000 ML

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

M 

PPF SLIP

01
Dilute Q²M PPF Slip according to installer preference. 

02
Spray onto the adhesive side of the film and the surface. 

03
Position and align the film as required. 

04
Squeegee excess solution from beneath the film. 

05
Proceed with final fixation once alignment is complete. 

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
What is Q²M PPF Slip used for? 

It is used as a lubricant during PPF installation.

02
Does it affect adhesive bonding? 

No. It allows positioning before final adhesion.

03
Is it suitable for all PPF? 

Yes. It is designed for modern automotive films.

04
Can dilution be adjusted? 

Yes. Dilution can be adjusted depending on working conditions.

05
Is it intended for professional use? 

Yes. It is designed for installers and wrapping specialists.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/18544741236380-Q-M-PPF-Slip)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
